CustomField.description: Stores the first month the individual becomes eligible for Medicare in MM/DD/YYYY format. This field is used for intake tracking and enrollment planning when full date precision is not required.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the first month of Medicare eligibility in MM/DD/YYYY format (for example, 03/01/2026).
CustomField.label: (Depricated)Eligibility Start Date
